programme.title: Watson
programme.desc: Following his brain tumor diagnosis, Watson goes on medical leave to seek treatment; a notorious South American dictator demands Watson see to his mysterious autoimmune condition personally.

programme.title: CBS News New York 11pm
programme.desc: Local news coverage.

programme.title: CBS News New York
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: An experimental naval aircraft crashes on Oahu, and Tennant and her team must find who is behind it before classified state secrets are exposed.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: After a brazen daytime robbery of a Navy Federal Credit Union, the NCIS team tracks down a group of adrenaline-seeking thieves; Tennant grows suspicious of Sam Hanna's reasons for being in Hawaii.

programme.desc: Mike Waltz, U.S. ambassador to the United Nations; former Attorney General Eric Holder; Amos Hochstein, former White House adviser on global infrastructure; former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Lily asks Devon and Nate to see Holden in a new light; Billy and Sally process their new normal; Stephanie connects with an old friend.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Dani confronts Andre about his run-in with Bill; Chelsea turns down her mother's offer; Leslie and Vanessa bond; Smitty has a new lead to share with Jacob; Derek and Ashley have a heated exchange about Grayson.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: A Lesson in Lending; Head-Splitting Breakup!
programme.desc: A young defendant tells an unbelievable story about how his sister "offered" to help pay for his girlfriend's boat; an ex-lover accuses a disabled woman of false arrest for assault.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Used Car Chaos!; Mom Goes After Daughter
programme.desc: A woman says a man scammed her on the sale of a used car; a woman sues her daughter for a car's down payment and repairs.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A battle over stray felines turns into a full-blown cat-astrophe! A landlord claims her neighbor scared off tenants, unleashed bad reviews and fed a bunch of stray cats. The neighbor argues she's the real menace who calls the authorities just to cause trouble. Watch as the judges claw out the truth!

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A couple say their mechanic received money from their insurance company, outsourced their car repair to someone else for a lower price, then pocketed the difference.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin reluctantly agrees to dog-sit a glamorous little companion, only to face an awkward twist when someone else lays claim to it; a joint celebration prompts Malcolm to question whether he and Mercedes are moving too fast.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette tries to bridge a growing divide at the office by bringing the driving examiners and counter clerks together; Vic stubbornly avoids seeing a doctor after an unusual injury, forcing Barb to get creative to help him.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a single mother and her son are abducted while visiting a state park, Maggie brings in Peter Olsen to help profile their suspect; as the team works, they make a harrowing discovery about an old case.

programme.desc: A woman is accused of rubbing pepper spray in her twin's face and threatening her with a butcher knife.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A co-op contract is signed, sealed and then suddenly scrapped! The seller claims the buyer vanished, leaving her deposit frozen in escrow limbo, but the buyer claims mixed messages derailed the deal. The sale might not have closed, but the dispute is wide open!

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A man accuses a paint correction specialist of damaging the artwork on his 1932 Ford Roadster; the specialist claims the plaintiff didn't properly dry his paint job.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: $10,000 Back Child Support Blues!; Brick to the Head?!
programme.desc: A relative sues an ex-con for repayment of a loan to pay child support to his three baby-mamas; a man denies hitting his sister in the head with a rock, explaining that he was aiming at his mother.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Love Triangle Assault!; Can't Buy Me Love!
programme.desc: A woman is accused of beating up her husband's girlfriend; a man claims his ex chose love over money.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A prized classic car turns problematic after repairs allegedly create more issues than solutions. The owner claims the shop dodged responsibility, and drove up costs, while the mechanics claim the vintage car needed rare parts which stalled progress. Watch as the restoration shifts from garage to courtroom.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: The plaintiff rented his car to a stranger through an app, then the car was returned damaged, and the stranger vanished.
